languages.text: "Наш мир ужасен. Все вокруг пытается вас убить, а если у него не получается, оно обязательно попробует еще раз. Лучшее, что есть здесь — это наши люди. Зарков закалил нас, подготовил к искуплению и присяге, а Последний Приказ вашего святейшего предка дал нам цель".

"It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."
languages.original_text: "Наш мир ужасен. Все вокруг пытается вас убить, а если у него не получается, оно обязательно попробует еще раз. Лучшее, что есть здесь — это наши люди. Зарков закалил нас, подготовил к искуплению и присяге, а Последний Приказ вашего святейшего предка дал нам цель".

traits.locale_text: "It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

"It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

"It is a foul place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, even though I have never been anywhere else to compare it to. Game is scarce, and every living thing is trying to kill you. There is little good on this world. Its name was given in honour of a First Call-Up sergeant, who later became a colonel, Andrzej Zarkov. And we are their unbroken heirs."

"It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

"It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

"It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

languages.text: 「ここは汚い場所です、御{mf|殿|殿}様。他に比べたことがないからですが。獲物は少なく、生き物は皆殺しにしようとします。この世界には良いものはほとんどありません。この世界の名前は、後に大佐になった最初の召集兵のアンジェイ・ザルコフにちなんで名付けられました。そして、私たちは彼らの断続的な相続人です」
languages.original_text: "It is a foul place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, even though I have never been anywhere else to compare it to. Game is scarce, and every living thing is trying to kill you. There is little good on this world. Its name was given in honour of a First Call-Up sergeant, who later became a colonel, Andrzej Zarkov. And we are their unbroken heirs."

traits.locale_text: 「ここは汚い場所です、御{mf|殿|殿}様。他に比べたことがないからですが。獲物は少なく、生き物は皆殺しにしようとします。この世界には良いものはほとんどありません。この世界の名前は、後に大佐になった最初の召集兵のアンジェイ・ザルコフにちなんで名付けられました。そして、私たちは彼らの断続的な相続人です。」

languages.text: « C'est un monde de terreurs. Toutes les créatures vivantes cherchent à vous tuer, et si elles n'y parviennent pas, je vous garantis qu'elles réessaieront. Mais le mieux, ici, ce sont nos troupes. Zarkov nous a forgés et préparés pour l'expiation et pour notre serment, là où l'Ordre ultime de votre ancêtre exalté nous a donné un but. »
languages.original_text: "It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un monde de terreurs. Toutes les créatures vivantes cherchent à vous tuer, et si elles n'y parviennent pas, je vous garantis qu'elles réessaieront. Mais le mieux, ici, ce sont nos troupes. Zarkov nous a forgés et préparés pour l'expiation et pour notre serment, là où l'Ordre ultime de votre ancêtre exalté nous a donné un but. »

languages.text: "Dehşet verici bir dünya. Yaşayan her şey sizi öldürmeye çalışıyor. Başaramadıklarında kesinlikle tekrar deniyorlar. Burada sahip olduğumuz en iyi şey insanlarımız. Yüce atanızın Son Emri bize amaç verdi, Zarkov ise bizi güçlendirdi. Bizi kefarete ve yeminimize hazırladı."
languages.original_text: "It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

traits.locale_text: "Dehşet verici bir dünya. Yaşayan her şey sizi öldürmeye çalışıyor. Başaramadıklarında kesinlikle tekrar deniyorlar. Burada sahip olduğumuz en iyi şey insanlarımız. Yüce atanızın Son Emri bize amaç verdi, Zarkov ise bizi güçlendirdi. Bizi kefarete ve yeminimize hazırladı."

languages.text: "Eine Welt des Schreckens. Alle lebenden Wesen hier wollen Euch töten, und wenn ihnen das nicht gelingt, versuchen sie es garantiert erneut. Das Beste, was wir hier haben, sind unsere Leute. Zarkov hat uns gestählt. Er hat uns auf die Erlösung und unseren Eid vorbereitet, aber der letzte Befehl Eures erhabenen Ahnherrn gab uns eine Bestimmung."
languages.original_text: "It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Welt des Schreckens. Alle lebenden Wesen hier wollen Euch töten, und wenn ihnen das nicht gelingt, versuchen sie es garantiert erneut. Das Beste, was wir hier haben, sind unsere Leute. Zarkov hat uns gestählt. Er hat uns auf die Erlösung und unseren Eid vorbereitet, aber der letzte Befehl Eures erhabenen Ahnherrn gab uns eine Bestimmung."

languages.text: «Es un mundo terrible. Todo está intentando matarle, y, si algo no lo consigue, volverá a intentarlo una y otra vez. Nuestro mayor recurso es nuestra gente. Zarkov nos ha templado, preparándonos para la expiación y el juramento, mientras que la última orden de su antepasado nos ha dado una razón de ser».
languages.original_text: "It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

traits.locale_text: «Es un mundo terrible. Todo está intentando matarle, y, si algo no lo consigue, volverá a intentarlo una y otra vez. Nuestro mayor recurso es nuestra gente. Zarkov nos ha templado, preparándonos para la expiación y el juramento, mientras que la última orden de su antepasado nos ha dado una razón de ser».

languages.text: “这是个凶险万分的世界。每个活物都想杀死你，如果一次杀不成，就肯定会再来一次。我们这儿最美好的东西，就是这里的人民。扎尔科夫磨炼了我们，让我们为赎罪、为誓言做好准备，而您那高贵的先祖留下的最后的命令，则赋予了我们存在的意义。”
languages.original_text: "It is a world of terrors. Every living thing is trying to kill you, and if it doesn't succeed, it will certainly try again. The best thing we have here is our people. Zarkov has tempered us, prepared us for atonement and our oath, whereas the Final Order of your exalted ancestor gave us purpose."

traits.locale_text: “这是个凶险万分的世界。每个活物都想杀死你，如果一次杀不成，就肯定会再来一次。我们这儿最美好的东西，就是这里的人民。扎尔科夫磨炼了我们，让我们为赎罪、为誓言做好准备，而您那高贵的先祖留下的最后的命令，则赋予了我们存在的意义。”
